channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's redistricting war leaves Republicans worse off
item.description: Data: Axios analysis of data from Dave's Redistricting and Redistricting Data Hub; Chart: Erin Davis/Axios Visuals The redistricting war President Tru...

item.title: Exclusive: OpenAI briefs feds and Five Eyes on new cyber product
item.description: OpenAI has been briefing federal agencies, state governments and Five Eyes allies on the capabilities of its new cyber product over the past week, Axi...

item.title: Scoop: Trump set to reclassify marijuana soon
item.description: The Trump administration is expected to move to reclassify marijuana as soon as Wednesday, per an administration official familiar with the matter. Wh...

item.title: Hands-on with ChatGPT's powerful new image engine
item.description: ChatGPT's new image engine promises a host of improvements including better typography, access to the web and an ability to reason. So Axios put it to...

item.title: Longtime Democratic Rep. David Scott dies at 80
item.description: Rep. David Scott (D-Ga.) has died at age 80, a senior House Democrat familiar with the matter confirmed to Axios. Driving the news: Scott served in Co...

item.title: White House pushes imminent easing of controls on marijuana
item.description: Under an administration plan, marijuana would be moved to Schedule III, like some common prescription painkillers. It now has the same Schedule I clas...

item.title: Supreme Court allows soldier to sue contractor over suicide bombing
item.description: The ruling will make it easier for troops hurt in combat zones to win damages as contractors become a larger part of military operations around the wo...

item.title: Democratic Rep. David Scott of Georgia dies at 80
item.description: The lawmaker, who had served in the chamber since 2003, was seeking a 13th term in his safely Democratic district.

item.title: Clearing Strait of Hormuz of mines could take 6 months, Pentagon tells Congress
item.description: The Pentagon assessment, shared in a classified briefing for lawmakers, suggests gasoline and oil prices could remain elevated through the midterm ele...

item.title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
item.description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington ...

item.title: Canada’s prime minister says economic ties with US are a weakness that must be corrected
item.description: “We have to take care of ourselves because we can’t rely on one foreign partner,” Mark Carney said in a video address. “We can’t control the disruptio...

item.title: Trump Keeps Gambling With the Economy — And Getting Away With It
item.description: President Donald Trump has taken one risk after another that could have destabilized the American economy. Iran is the latest crisis to test U.S. econ...

item.title: Capitol agenda: GOP bets on immigration fight, not big bills
What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
